speaker: MATT
raw_text: I need you to roll a hell of a persuasion check on this one.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "No, its head's fine. Okay." Passes it over.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I subtly pick up the head from the ground.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: So we can put him in the mansion?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: All right, yes, I'll make the mansion.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: All right. I kiss him on his forehead and say: it's going to be okay. Go in there, take a nap, and show them how to cook.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I will. You come back soon, my dumpling." And he squeezes your cheek a little bit. (whispers) "He has a mansion."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) "A mansion!"

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: (whispers) And he's super interested in her.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You're of marrying age, young Pike."

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Holy shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: We'll talk about it later.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I'll tell you how it is."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: What?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Mansion. I'll tell you how it is."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Oh, I've been there! You can go stay--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "You've been to his mansion?"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: I have my own room. You can go stay in my room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "I don't know if I want to--"

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Hey Scanlan, how will he know which room is my room?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Your room is the one covered in rose petals.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: "Show me the mansion."

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: So I will cast the spell, I'll sit down and start humming. (singing) My house is a very, very, very fine house. With chickens everywhere. It used to be so fair--

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: As the shimmering doorway is conjured in the center of the room.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I take him in, I show him to his room.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The door opens and he looks inside. "Whoa." Turns around to you, looking at you through the doorway. "It's big."

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: It's very big.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Here, come with me. I take him upstairs, take him to his room. And before I bid him adieu I say: later tonight we can discuss more, but I would like to ask for your granddaughter's hand in marriage. But I'll need your permission first.

speaker: MATT
raw_text: All righty. So. Pike. So as you step forward, they point out this glyph on the wall. You're going to cast Dispel Magic on it, I need you to go ahead and roll a d20 and add your spellcasting ability modifier, which--

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Want to throw a pillow down there?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What an interesting idea.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I go get a pillow and I throw it at the rune.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: (laughs) Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: How'd it work, does that, is that how you're supposed to do it?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: The pillow-- (impact) down the stairs.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, you did it wrong, see, nothing happened. (laughter)

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, go get the pillow, try again.

preceding_turns.speaker: MARISHA
preceding_turns.text: Try a lumbar. Maybe a different result.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So wait wait wait, the last time you saw runes like this, you lost the carpet. How did you lose the carpet?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, so, did we never talk about that? Yeah. A bunch of us were riding it-- Ah, it was the dwarf, I swear it was the dwarf. We were on the carpet and there were runes on the walls and as soon as we got near the runes the carpet went (raspberry noise) and fell down.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: So it might disenchant whatever we have on us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, it could do that, it could also-- I don't know anything about magic, but I assume it could burn us.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Well, how do we make it not burn us?

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: Well. (sighs) I mean. Hey, Shorty, you're our best bet here, I don't know anything about this shit.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Who can undo magical thingies?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not me, Pikey! Pike? Pike, you got any undo magicky things?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: This would be a Dispel Magic spell, for the record.

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah, I have Dispel Magic.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You have it prepared?

preceding_turns.speaker: ASHLEY
preceding_turns.text: Yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Then yeah, you could give it a shot.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: You're my girl!

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I could try my Dispel Magic ability.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: What's that one?

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: It's called a bullet. I'll shoot it until it doesn't work anymore.
